title: The Maldives of the North

scenes.text: This pristine lake is surrounded by majestic mountain views.
This is Lake Bohinj, nestled in the Julian Alps, Slovenia.
Lake Bohinj is the largest glacial lake in Slovenia, known for its crystal-clear waters.
Its vibrant colors range from deep blue to emerald green.
scenes.label: VIBRANT COLORS

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Lake Bohinj, Julian Alps - Slovenia. This stunning glacial lake is famed for its crystal-clear waters and breathtaking views. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌊
